name: Chocolate Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix vanilla waffle crumbs with melted margarine and spread in a greased springform pan.
3. Bake for about 10 minutes until lightly browned, then remove from heat and let cool completely.
4. In a bowl, melt carms and pour into the cooled crust.
5. Add evaporated milk to the cream cheese and stir until smooth; add vanilla.
6. Stir in chopped pecans and sugar until combined.
7. Sprinkle melted semi-sweet chocolate chips over the top of the cheesecake filling.
8. Place in the preheated oven and bake for 60-75 minutes, or until set.
9. Let cool completely before refrigerating.
10. Serve chilled with whipped cream if desired.
Chocolate chips should be melted before using.
